text:
⏰ ScriptCue — Day 1 content session (midday).

Ready to post:
• Hero Reel: assets/reels/R1_hero_2026-05-30.mp4 → Instagram Reels + YouTube Short
• Indie Hackers launch post (vault/drafts/2026-05-30.md)

Open Claude Code and say 'run day 1' for captions + walkthrough.

⏰ ScriptCue — Day 2 (Sun, light day).

• Reply to comments/DMs on yesterday's IG Reel
• Premium YouTube video: generate the 4 Flow clips + record a short app demo (shot list in vault/drafts/youtube-v1-flow.md), then send to Claude to assemble
• Optional: post 2 IH comments to start earning posting rights

Open Claude Code and say 'run day 2'.
